summary.en: Ethiopia operates on 220V / 50Hz mains power and uses European continental type-C, type-E, and type-F plug/socket formats. Wireless and IoT devices with mains power input must be designed and tested for 220V/50Hz operation. Electrical safety must meet IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment — the current generation standard) or IEC 60950-1 (legacy, superseded) as adopted by ESA. Chinese products designed for 220V are voltage-compatible but plug format adaptation (from Chinese GB 2099 type-I or two-pin to European C/E/F) may be required depending on device class.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚市电为220V / 50Hz，使用欧洲大陆式C型、E型和F型插头/插座。带市电输入的无线及物联网设备须针对220V/50Hz运行进行设计和测试。电气安全须符合ESA采用的IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息及通信技术设备——现行代际标准）或IEC 60950-1（旧版，已被取代）。针对220V设计的中国产品电压兼容，但根据设备类别，可能需要将插头格式从中国GB 2099 I型或两脚插头适配为欧洲C/E/F型。
summary.zht: 埃塞俄比亞市電為220V / 50Hz，使用歐洲大陸式C型、E型和F型插頭/插座。帶市電輸入的無線及物聯網裝置須針對220V/50Hz運行進行設計和測試。電氣安全須符合ESA採用的IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊及通訊技術設備——現行代際標準）或IEC 60950-1（舊版，已被取代）。針對220V設計的中國產品電壓相容，但根據設備類別，可能需要將插頭格式從中國GB 2099 I型或兩腳插頭適配為歐洲C/E/F型。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (Audio/Video, IT and Communication Technology Equipment — Safety) — adopted by ESA
IEC 60950-1 (legacy IT equipment safety, superseded by IEC 62368-1) — adopted by ESA

summary.en: China GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1, now transitioning to GB 4943.1-2022 aligned with IEC 62368-1) covers IT equipment electrical safety and is a mandatory CCC requirement. China mains voltage is 220V/50Hz — voltage is compatible with Ethiopia. However, Chinese plug standard GB 2099 (type I two-flat-pin or three-pin) is not compatible with Ethiopian type-C/E/F sockets; plug adaptation or an IEC C13/C14 inlet design is commonly used for export products.
summary.zh: 中国GB 4943.1（等同于IEC 60950-1，现正过渡至与IEC 62368-1接轨的GB 4943.1-2022）涵盖信息技术设备电气安全，是CCC强制认证要求。中国市电电压为220V/50Hz，与埃塞俄比亚兼容。但中国插头标准GB 2099（I型两扁脚或三脚插头）与埃塞俄比亚C/E/F型插座不兼容；出口产品通常采用插头适配或IEC C13/C14插座设计。
summary.zht: 中國GB 4943.1（等同於IEC 60950-1，現正過渡至與IEC 62368-1接軌的GB 4943.1-2022）涵蓋資訊技術設備電氣安全，是CCC強制認證要求。中國市電電壓為220V/50Hz，與埃塞俄比亞相容。但中國插頭標準GB 2099（I型兩扁腳或三腳插頭）與埃塞俄比亞C/E/F型插座不相容；出口產品通常採用插頭適配或IEC C13/C14插座設計。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — IT Equipment Electrical Safety (China, IEC 60950-1 / IEC 62368-1-aligned)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — electrical safety requirement (China)
GB 2099 — Chinese plug/socket standard (type I, not compatible with Ethiopian C/E/F)

gap.en: 220V/50Hz voltage is compatible, but Chinese plug format (GB 2099 type I or two-flat-pin) is not compatible with Ethiopian type-C/E/F sockets — product must ship with C/E/F plug or IEC inlet. Electrical safety must be demonstrated to IEC 62368-1 (or IEC 60950-1) as adopted by ESA; CCC/GB 4943.1 data may support the application but is not automatically accepted. IEC test reports from an accredited laboratory are recommended.
gap.zh: 220V/50Hz电压兼容，但中国插头格式（GB 2099 I型或两扁脚插头）与埃塞俄比亚C/E/F型插座不兼容——产品须配备C/E/F插头或IEC插座。电气安全须依据ESA采用的IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）证明合规；CCC/GB 4943.1数据可作为申请佐证，但不会被自动接受。建议提供来自认可实验室的IEC测试报告。
gap.zht: 220V/50Hz電壓相容，但中國插頭格式（GB 2099 I型或兩扁腳插頭）與埃塞俄比亞C/E/F型插座不相容——產品須配備C/E/F插頭或IEC插座。電氣安全須依據ESA採用的IEC 62368-1（或IEC 60950-1）證明合規；CCC/GB 4943.1數據可作為申請佐證，但不會被自動接受。建議提供來自認可實驗室的IEC測試報告。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Devices with mains power input must be rated for 220V/50Hz and fitted with a type-C, type-E, or type-F plug (or an IEC inlet) for the Ethiopian market. Electrical safety compliance to IEC 62368-1 as adopted by ESA is required. Chinese GB 4943.1 / CCC test data may be presented as supporting evidence. Verify specific ESA electrical safety requirements with a qualified regulatory consultant.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 带市电输入的设备须额定支持220V/50Hz，并为埃塞俄比亚市场配备C型、E型或F型插头（或IEC插座）。须符合ESA采用的IEC 62368-1电气安全要求。中国GB 4943.1 / CCC测试数据可作为佐证材料提交。请就具体ESA电气安全要求咨询合格监管顾问。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 帶市電輸入的裝置須額定支持220V/50Hz，並為埃塞俄比亞市場配備C型、E型或F型插頭（或IEC插座）。須符合ESA採用的IEC 62368-1電氣安全要求。中國GB 4943.1 / CCC測試數據可作為佐證材料提交。請就具體ESA電氣安全要求諮詢合格監管顧問。
